title: Welcome to Digz N' Lidz
excerpt: We're opening our doors soon. Here's what to expect from the RC Experience Cafe.
content:
Digz N' Lidz is opening soon, bringing a proper RC sandpit experience to the area. Sixteen seats, three session lengths, and food and drink ordered straight to where you're sat.

We'll be posting updates here as opening day gets closer, including how booking works and what's on the menu.
